summary: At exact HEAD 97c7684b94681cc4fe1c902d2b2cabb888175546, the One-command PR-ready Closure implementation conforms to the Story, Architecture, structured Spec, and OCR-T-1..5 test plan. The guarded autonomous profile owns the seven-node diagnose-to-final_prepare DAG, binds mutation and review to the managed-worktree HEAD, repairs needs_changes through a bounded verify/review replay, persists typed recovery, and reserves PR creation, merge, waiver, and material external effects for explicit human commands. No code/spec defect or uncovered changed path was found.
inspection_summary: Inspected the generated implementation review request and independently traced OCR-S-1..8 and C-OCR-1, INV-OCR-2, INV-OCR-3, S-OCR-4, S-OCR-5, and S-OCR-6 through the run-session owners, safe-action orchestration, runtime adapter/connectors, independent review, human-decision persistence, CLI surface, and focused unit/E2E tests. The success, restart/resume, seven-field human decision, verification failure, needs_changes convergence, no-progress, quota, timeout, CI-pending, and cancellation branches all have concrete producer and persistence assertions. Regression guard covered explicit legacy/disable fallback, stable legacy dispatch identity, existing connector/reviewer ownership, cancellation terminal authority, and rejection of external-authority seams. Path-surface coverage followed CLI input through persisted Run state, managed-worktree commit, read-only review, repaired-HEAD evidence rebind, public JSON/human recovery output, and current-HEAD final_prepare authority. OCR-S-8 remains intentionally open until the focused roadmap closure commit, refreshed Gate/CI evidence, and explicit execute merge; that lifecycle sequencing is specified behavior rather than implementation drift.
inspection_evidence: Current-HEAD verification evidence records strict-head passes at 97c7684b94681cc4fe1c902d2b2cabb888175546 for targeted unit (258 passed, 0 failed), integration (4 passed, 0 failed), typecheck, and the independent real-Git runtime E2E (4 passed, 0 failed). The E2E observation binds managed-worktree implementation, needs_changes repair, reverify/rereview, final_prepare on the repaired HEAD, typed stop/resume branches, and the external-authority boundary. Architecture conformance at the same HEAD reports 80 violations versus origin/main baseline 81, with no new reverse CLI dependency.
judgment_delta: Initial judgment: likely aligned, but the repaired-HEAD review replay, detailed runtime recovery propagation, full state matrix, and OCR-S-8 lifecycle boundary required fresh proof at 97c7684. Final judgment: pass, because source tracing and strict-current-HEAD verification show every implementation acceptance path and changed surface is covered, while the only unchecked Story item is the deliberately post-PR delivery closure.
